description.unified: Deals P.DMG to frontal enemies in range and stuns them for [0.6 sec->1 sec]. This attack always inflicts a Crit Hit.

For 20 sec, places Priscilla and an ally with the highest ATK in 'Coordination' state, and dispels Negative Effects. Priscilla and the ally in Coordination State get an ATK boost equal to 15% of Priscilla's ATK + ???.
Deals P.DMG to nearby enemies in a circular range and draws them towards herself. If activated while in the [Coordination] state, hit enemies take [40% P.DMG->30% extra P.DMG and M. DMG] for 10 sec.
Own ATK is increased by ??? , and Penetration is increased by [160->100].

light.unified: Stun duration is increased by [1.8 sec->2 sec].

dark.unified: While in Co-Op state, auto attacks increase the target's received DMG from all sources by [25%->30%].

description.unified: [Vital Strike] Increases DMG by 50%, and for 10 sec, reduces the target's P.Block chance by {0}.
[Coordination] Increases ATK Boost by {0}% and reduces Cooldown of the Hero with the highest ATK by [20%->30%].
[Turbulent Dance] DMG is increased by {0}% and target is inflicted by Stun for [1.8 sec->3 sec].
[Weapon Mastery] Increases ATK boost by 50% and All DEF for self by {0}%.

dark.unified: Increase all allies' ATK and P.DEF by 3% of own ATK and P.DEF.

description.unified: When attacking the enemy with [Vital Strike] or [Turbulent Dance], per every hit enemy, corresponding skill's cooldown is reduced by {0} sec and ATK Spd is increased by [2%->50] for 5 sec. ATK Spd boost can be stacked up to 10 times max.

Summons the Soul of Tumultuous Dance, Excilius for 12 sec, increasing ATK of self and [3 allies->the ally] with the highest ATK by [20%->40%] and Crit DMG by [32%->40%]. Additionally grants immunity to CC effect to [3 allies->an ally] with the highest ATK.

1.from: Reduces Skill Activation Requirements by 4 sec.
1.to: Reduces Skill Activation requirements by 4 sec.
1.unified: Reduces Skill Activation requirements by 4 sec.

2.from: For the duration, increases DMG dealt by 3allies with the highest ATK by 14%.
2.to: For the duration of Skill, increases DMG dealt by the ally with the highest ATK by 30%.
2.unified: For the duration of Skill, increases DMG dealt by the [3 allies->ally] with the highest ATK by [14%->30%].
